summary: Laser Photonics (NASDAQ:LASE)has announced a warrant exchange agreement to simplify its capital structure. The company will exchange warrants from its August 2024 PIPE financing that had a$4.34 per share exercise priceand full ratchet anti-dilution provisions, previously allowing the purchase of0.8 million shares, for3.2 million sharesof common stock.CEO Wayne Tupuola stated that this exchange strengthens the company's position to execute strategic growth initiatives, including advancing AI-driven lasers with robotic cells, expanding anti-drone laser systems, and pursuing potential M&A opportunities.
